mapper.sql: id, targetMethod, tableObject, dataFrom, dataTo, syncParams, syncStartTime, syncEndTime, isSuccess, dataCount, syncType
mapper.insert:
insert into t_sync_log
id,
targetMethod,
tableObject,
dataFrom,
dataTo,
syncParams,
syncStartTime,
syncEndTime,
isSuccess,
dataCount,
syncType,
exception,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{targetMethod,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{tableObject,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{dataFrom,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{dataTo,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{syncParams,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{syncStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{syncEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{isSuccess,jdbcType=BIT},
#{dataCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{syncType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
#{exception,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update t_sync_log
targetMethod = #{targetMethod,jdbcType=CHAR},
tableObject = #{tableObject,jdbcType=CHAR},
dataFrom = #{dataFrom,jdbcType=CHAR},
dataTo = #{dataTo,jdbcType=CHAR},
syncParams = #{syncParams,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
syncStartTime = #{syncStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
syncEndTime = #{syncEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
isSuccess = #{isSuccess,jdbcType=BIT},
dataCount = #{dataCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
syncType = #{syncType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
exception = #{exception,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_sync_log set targetMethod = #{targetMethod,jdbcType=CHAR}, tableObject = #{tableObject,jdbcType=CHAR}, dataFrom = #{dataFrom,jdbcType=CHAR}, dataTo = #{dataTo,jdbcType=CHAR}, syncParams = #{syncParams,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, syncStartTime = #{syncStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, syncEndTime = #{syncEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, isSuccess = #{isSuccess,jdbcType=BIT}, dataCount = #{dataCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, syncType = #{syncType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, exception = #{exception,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_sync_log set targetMethod = #{targetMethod,jdbcType=CHAR}, tableObject = #{tableObject,jdbcType=CHAR}, dataFrom = #{dataFrom,jdbcType=CHAR}, dataTo = #{dataTo,jdbcType=CHAR}, syncParams = #{syncParams,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, syncStartTime = #{syncStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, syncEndTime = #{syncEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, isSuccess = #{isSuccess,jdbcType=BIT}, dataCount = #{dataCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, syncType = #{syncType,jdbcType=SMALLINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
